visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Anagram Case Sensitivity
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The anagram check fails when strings have different casing (e.g., 'Listen' and 'Silent'). Fix the logic to be case-insensitive.

solution.explanation: To perform a case-insensitive comparison, both strings should be converted to the same case (lowercase or uppercase) before sorting and comparing.
